mapper.insert: insert into ebike (license_plate, feature_description, owner_name, owner_id_card, owner_phone_number) VALUES (#{licensePlate}, #{featureDescription}, #{ownerName}, #{ownerIdCard}, #{ownerPhoneNumber})

insert into ebike (license_plate, feature_description, owner_name, owner_id_card, owner_phone_number) VALUES
(#{item.licensePlate}, #{item.featureDescription}, #{item.ownerName}, #{item.ownerIdCard}, #{item.ownerPhoneNumber})
